title: Custom Partitioners in Hadoop MapReduce
description: The 'lib/partition' directory houses custom partitioners for Hadoop MapReduce. These partitioners, including BinaryPartitioner.java and HashPartitioner.java, extend the base Partitioner<K, V> class. They implement unique data distribution strategies, such as BinaryPartitioner using a byte subarray, HashPartitioner using key hash code, and RehashPartitioner rehashing for uniform distribution. These partitioners collaborate within MapReduce jobs, directing key-value pairs to appropriate reducers. This implementation follows the Partitioner architectural pattern, ensuring efficient data processing in Hadoop clusters.
